marketing.title: SolarGuard Pro | The Ultimate Survival Flashlight
marketing.headline: Never run out of power. Solar-powered reliability for the modern survivor.
marketing.description: Engineered for absolute reliability, this dual-charge (Solar + USB-C) torch is your primary light source for camping and emergencies. 500m beam, 84g ultra-lightweight, and 4 tactical modes.
bullets: Emergency Lantern: Built-in COB side light
